calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion, To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CALPITAL ONE, NA'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to enter judgment pursuant to stipulated settlement is granted. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment award the amount identified in this motion, $1,258.49 principal sum and $298.61 in costs. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
